content.label: type vs interface
content.value: interface for object shapes/contracts; type for unions, tuples, utilities. Interfaces support declaration merging.

content.label: Generic constraints
content.value: T extends { createdAt: Date }. Restricts T to shapes with required properties.

content.label: Decorators
content.value: @Component, @Injectable, @Pipe — metadata annotations. Angular compiles them at build time.

content.label: Strict mode
content.value: "strict": true in tsconfig. Enables strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, useUnknownInCatchVariables.

content.label: Utility types
content.value: Partial<T>, Pick<T,K>, Omit<T,K>, Record<K,V>, Required<T> — avoid code duplication.

content.label: Change detection
content.value: Angular checks component tree top-down. Default strategy uses Zone.js dirty-checking.

content.label: OnPush strategy
content.value: Only re-check when @Input reference changes or async pipe emits. Massive perf win.

content.label: Signals
content.value: Angular 16+ reactive primitives. signal(), computed(), effect(). Fine-grained — no Zone.js needed.

content.label: ng-content
content.value: Projects external content into component slots. Multi-slot with select=".class" or [attr].

content.label: ViewChild vs ContentChild
content.value: ViewChild queries own template; ContentChild queries projected content (ng-content).

content.label: Lifecycle order
content.value: ngOnChanges → ngOnInit → ngDoCheck → ngAfterContentInit → ngAfterViewInit → ngOnDestroy

content.label: providedIn: 'root'
content.value: Singleton app-wide, tree-shaken if unused. Default for most services.

content.label: Component providers
content.value: providers: [MyService] in @Component — new instance per component, destroyed with it.

content.label: InjectionToken
content.value: Type-safe token for non-class values (config objects, primitives, functions).

content.label: inject() function
content.value: Alternative to constructor injection. Works in factories, guards, interceptors, and signal contexts.

content.label: @Self / @SkipSelf
content.value: @Self = only own injector; @SkipSelf = skip own, walk up; @Optional = null if not found.

content.label: Cold vs hot
content.value: Cold: new execution per subscriber (HTTP). Hot: shared execution (Subject, WebSocket).

content.label: Subject vs BehaviorSubject
content.value: Subject = no initial value; BehaviorSubject = requires init, replays last value to new subscribers.

content.label: switchMap
content.value: Cancels previous inner observable on new emission. Ideal for typeahead/search HTTP.

content.label: combineLatest vs forkJoin
content.value: combineLatest = emits on any change; forkJoin = waits for all to complete then emits once.

content.label: takeUntilDestroyed
content.value: Angular 16+ operator. Auto-unsubscribes on component destroy. Use in ngOnInit.

content.label: async pipe
content.value: Subscribes and unsubscribes automatically. Triggers OnPush change detection on emit.

content.label: Template-driven
content.value: [(ngModel)] binding. Simple forms. Logic in template. Harder to unit-test.

content.label: Reactive Forms
content.value: FormGroup/FormControl/FormArray. Explicit, testable, scalable. Logic in component class.

content.label: Validators
content.value: Validators.required, Validators.email, Validators.min(). Custom: ValidatorFn returns null | error object.

content.label: updateOn
content.value: updateOn: 'blur' or 'submit' — defer validation to focus loss or form submit event.

content.label: FormArray
content.value: Dynamic list of controls. Use for repeating fields (addresses, contacts).

content.label: Lazy loading
content.value: loadComponent/loadChildren: () => import(...). Splits bundle. Reduces initial load.

content.label: Route guards
content.value: canActivate, canDeactivate, canMatch — functions returning boolean or UrlTree.

content.label: ActivatedRoute
content.value: Inject for params, queryParams, data. Use snapshot for one-time reads, observable for changes.

content.label: Resolver
content.value: resolve: { data: myResolver } — pre-fetches data before navigation completes.

content.label: Router events
content.value: NavigationStart, NavigationEnd — use for loading spinners, analytics tracking.

content.label: trackBy
content.value: trackBy: (i, item) => item.id in *ngFor. Prevents full DOM re-render on list changes.

content.label: Pure pipes
content.value: Pure pipes only recalculate when input reference changes. Default and preferred.

content.label: @defer block
content.value: Angular 17+ template syntax. Lazy-renders content on viewport/idle/interaction.

content.label: Bundle analysis
content.value: ng build --stats-json + webpack-bundle-analyzer. Find large third-party imports.

content.label: Standalone components
content.value: No NgModule = better tree-shaking. Import only what the component needs.
